---
title: "Real Time Rendering"
subtitle: "placeholder"
author: "Thibault Tricard"
date: "2026"
lang: fr
bibliography: references.bib
header-includes: |
  \newcommand{\rad}{L}
  \newcommand{\brdf}{f_r}
  \newcommand{\pos}{x}
  \newcommand{\dir}{\omega}
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: report
    classoption: [a4paper, 12pt]
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    colorlinks: true
    link-citations: true
  html:
    css: styles.css
    toc: false
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}

::: cover-page

::: cover-top
# Real Time Rendering

#### Du pipeline graphique aux techniques modernes
:::

::: cover-image
![](figures/cover.png)
:::

::: cover-bottom
**Thibault Tricard**

2026
:::

:::

:::

```{=html}
<span style="display:none">
$$
\newcommand{\rad}{L}
\newcommand{\brdf}{f_r}
\newcommand{\pos}{x}
\newcommand{\dir}{\omega}
$$
</span>
```

{{< include chapitres/chapitre1.qmd >}}
{{< include chapitres/chapitre2.qmd >}}
{{< include chapitres/chapitre3.qmd >}}

## Références {.unnumbered}
